sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81221" key="peridai/dalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιδαίδᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n81221.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-variegated</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:388" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.388</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
